name: Meeting Prep
author: pallux-os
description: Automatically researches attendees, summarises relevant context, and prepares talking points before each calendar meeting.

params.prompt: Research each attendee from the meeting invite. Summarise their role, recent activity, and any relevant context from past interactions. Keep each summary to 3-4 sentences.
Based on the meeting agenda and attendee context, prepare 5 concise talking points and 3 questions to ask. Format as a brief one-page brief.
